Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Sanctions Order
Off Calendar Dec-14-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: PLAINTIFF JAZMINN FISHER's Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Sanctions Order.

Appearances (via Zoom):
R. Michael Lieberman, Esq., Law Offices of, (415) 929-3197, for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

RE: Plaintiff's Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Sanctions Order.

At the outset, the court states its concerns regarding the sanction order being two years old and of the pending Order to Show Cause scheduled before the Presiding Judge of this court. Counsel presented oral argument to support their position regarding the subject motion. At conclusion of argument, the court denies the subject motion without prejudice. Counsel is advised that he may raise the issue within the subject motion before the Presiding Judge.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION FOR IMPOSITION OF SANCTIONS
Off Calendar Nov-24-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Master Motion Calendar on Nov-24-2020 in 206 - Appearance only by R. Michael Lieberman, Esq. for Plaintiff Jazminn Danielle Fisher. Plaintiff's Motion for Award of Monetary Sanctions for Defendant's Lawyer's Bad Faith Conduct is granted. The Court rules as follows:

Regarding July 27, 2020 trial call:
Travel to and from court and appearance for trial call {$450 x 2 hours} = $900
Trial preparation {$450 x 8 hours} = $3,600

Regarding July 28, 2020 settlement conference:
Research and drafting settlement brief and preparing for settlement conference {$450 x 2 hours} = $900
Travel to and from court and appearance for settlement conference {$450 x 2 hours} = $900

Regarding July 29, 2020 trial call:
Travel to and from court and appearance for trial call {$450 x 2 hours} = $900

Regarding August 4, 2020 trial call:
Trial preparation {$450 x 3 hours} = $1,350
Travel to and from court and appearance for trial call {$450 x 2 hours} = $900

Regarding sidetracking the hearing with Judge Pro Tem Kane on February 13, 2020:
Research and drafting brief {$450 x 2 hours} = $900

Regarding this motion:
Researching and drafting motion {$450 x 3 hours} = $1,350

Total
Total hours {$450 x 26 hours} = $11,700

The Court reiterated the Discovery sanctions awarded by Judge Pro Tem Kane = $2,000

Grand total {$11,700 + $2,000} = $13,700

Plaintiff's counsel to prepare order and submit to Court. Judge: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: JIRoque; Court Reporter: Matter Not Reported. (206)
